citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
The program of veterinary care recommends the deer be tested for fecal parasites twice yearly. The deer were last tested
in June of 2025, but haven't been done twice within the past year. Not following the program of veterinary care doesn't
ensure the deer are free of fecal parasites and that adequate veterinary care is being carried out as per the guidance in
the program of veterinary care. The facility must get the deer fecal tested as per the guidance in the program of veterinary
care. Correct by 6/26/26.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative.
End of report.
n

narrative:
2.40(b)(2) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
The program of veterinary care recommends the deer be tested for fecal parasites twice yearly. The deer were last tested 
in June of 2025, but haven't been done twice within the past year. Not following the program of veterinary care doesn't 
ensure the deer are free of fecal parasites and that adequate veterinary care is being carried out as per the guidance in 
the program of veterinary care. The facility must get the deer fecal tested as per the guidance in the program of veterinary 
care. Correct by 6/26/26. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representative. 
 
End of report.
